    Method
    Description
    JobExecutionResult
    JobExecutionContext.ResultBuilder.cancelled()
    The job processing failed permanently.
    JobExecutionResult

    The job processing failed and might be retried.
    JobExecutionResult

    The job processing failed and might be retried.

    JobExecutionResult

    The job processing finished successfully.
